chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools protocol bridge for driving local tabs during debugging or automation.

exa.description: Exa Search MCP server for querying Exa Search.

mobile-mcp.description: Mobile Next MCP server for automating iOS/Android simulators and devices.

context7.description: Context7 MCP for React documentation lookup.

deepwiki.description: DeepWiki MCP server for querying public code/docs without local checkout.

linear.description: Hosted Linear MCP; exposes issue search, create, and workflow tooling.

notion.description: Notion MCP; search, read, create, and update Notion pages and databases.

next-devtools.description: Next.js dev server introspection (project metadata, logs, page insights).

obsidian.description: Local Obsidian vault access via obsidian-mcp-server.

firecrawl.description: Firecrawl hosted MCP for authenticated scraping and extraction.

github.description: GitHub MCP server (requires PAT in GITHUB_TOKEN).

signoz.description: SigNoz Query MCP server (logs, traces, metrics).

shadcn.description: shadcn/ui registry MCP for browsing component recipes.

iterm.description: iTerm2 terminal bridge via local iterm-mcp

XcodeBuildMCP.description: XcodeBuild MCP server for building, testing, and inspecting Xcode projects and simulators.
